# Recommended GitHub Labels

Use these labels to organize issues and pull requests in the FlowPilot repository.

## Type Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `bug` | `#d73a4a` | Something isn't working |
| `enhancement` | `#a2eeef` | New feature or request |
| `documentation` | `#0075ca` | Improvements or additions to documentation |
| `good first issue` | `#7057ff` | Good for newcomers |
| `help wanted` | `#008672` | Extra attention is needed |

## Priority Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `priority: critical` | `#b60205` | Must be fixed immediately |
| `priority: high` | `#d93f0b` | Should be fixed soon |
| `priority: medium` | `#fbca04` | Normal priority |
| `priority: low` | `#0e8a16` | Nice to have |

## Area Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `area: dashboard` | `#1d76db` | Dashboard page |
| `area: projects` | `#1d76db` | Projects feature |
| `area: tasks` | `#1d76db` | Tasks feature |
| `area: kanban` | `#1d76db` | Kanban board |
| `area: ui` | `#bfd4f2` | UI/UX related |
| `area: performance` | `#f9d0c4` | Performance improvements |

## Status Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `status: in progress` | `#e4e669` | Currently being worked on |
| `status: blocked` | `#000000` | Blocked by another issue |
| `status: needs review` | `#d4c5f9` | Needs code review |
| `wontfix` | `#ffffff` | This will not be worked on |
| `duplicate` | `#cfd3d7` | This issue already exists |
